ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2022, 2024) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "results_announced_date" TEXT /* Date when results were announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the district data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the precinct is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the precinct data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "early_voting_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if early voting is allowed for this method */,
  "absentee_voting_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if absentee voting is allowed for this method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the candidate is running */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes received by the candidate */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes received by the candidate */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes received by the candidate */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" TEXT /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "early_registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of early registrations */,
  "absentee_registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of absentee registrations */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration data was last updated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the registration data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots_cast" (
  "ballots_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballots cast record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voting method */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast */,
  "early_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of early ballots cast */,
  "absentee_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots cast */,
  "ballots_cast_date" TEXT /* Date when the ballots were cast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ballots cast data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballots_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
